title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: AMLA launches Q3 with direct supervision over 400+ EU crypto firms while France, UK, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Israel all enforce licensing deadlines between July and September. The MiCA review consultation (31 Aug deadline) will determine DeFi and NFT treatment through 2027, and 13 active consultations across EU, UK, and Ireland create the largest EMEA compliance procurement window since MiCA passage.
